transcript.text:
How spicy is the "normal" level?
There weren't any accidents so far
- No accidents? - Yes
(Spicy enough to not cause any accidents...)
(Here comes an insane spiciness)
(Spicy braised ribs)
Oh, that's a lot
(The color is horrifying at first glance) The color of this is too scary
(Is this Hell...?) Lava-like, hell-like vibe?
(Super fearsome) My lips are trembling
(Super fearsome, even makes her tremble...)
(Incoming shadow of death...) The spiciness is deathly
(Feeling more and more lightheaded...)
(I need to survive....)
(Will she be able to survive the braised ribs?) Oh... help
(Today's spicy must-eat place is located in Yaksu Market)

Hello, everyone
Today, I am here at Yaksu
Today,
I'm here to eat very spicy braised ribs
(Didn't even dare because she was scared) I wanted to go to this place for a long time,
but I couldn't because I was a bit scared
But...
These days, same with spicy ramyun and stuff,
(Claims that she is not the spice wimp anymore...?) I don't think I am a spice wimp now, so I've been craving this
This has in business for almost 40 years
It was featured on TV a lot and is very famous
(Located in Yaksu Market) "Let's Eat Spicy Braised Ribs"
(Will she be able to escape being a spice wimp?) I will give this place a shot today
(An entrance that has the aura of a delicious eatery)
(Enters the store) Oh, hello
What should I eat...?

There's spicy braised pork ribs and spicy braised beef ribs
How spicy is the "normal" level?
It's around the spiciness of chili peppers
There weren't any accidents so far
- No accidents? - Yes
Since the braised pork ribs are the main,
I'll get the normal level of 4 servings of braised pork ribs
And for the braised beef ribs...
- Please make it spicy - Even spicier?
2 servings...?
Do you eat all that alone?
(Of course) Yes
That's possible...?
Will I be able to survive it...?
(In order to survive) Please give me one soft tofu stew as well
Okay

Seriously, at this hour...?
- I'm a huge fan of Tzuyang - Oh my
- I sped here via subway from the Yeonsinnae branch - Hello, oh, really?
I saw on TV that
- you eat food very deliciously - Oh, really?
(Exploding with good words) You do a lot of good deeds as well
And eat so deliciously...
Thank you
(Me too) I can recognize her now that I see her
(There's a branch in Yeonsinnae, so please give lots of love) There's one more store in Yeonsinnae... I didn't know
(The red pepper powder goes in ruthlessly...)
(Grand reveal)
(The red color makes you sweat just looking at it...)
(Will the spice wimp Tzuyang be able to handle it...?)
(The ribs are here) Thank you
(A bunch) Wow, that's a lot

(The braised beef ribs are plenty with just 2 servings) It's a lot
It looks so good
Wow, but
the color is different with the spicy flavor!
This one...
(Braised pork ribs) It's slightly red
(Red color that is rated PG-13) but it's a common kind of red, but this one is...
(Rated R, merciless red color...) Lava-like, hell-like vibe?
Will it be a lot spicy?
I'm curious
Bon appétit
Wow, look at this
I love things like this
(The layer that forms on top of the soup) If there's a layer, it means the soup is very thick
Oh, it's spicy
It's spicy but good

It's exactly the spiciness of chili peppers
Kind of...
(Speechless)
(The spiciness is slowly coming up...) It's spicy... So spicy, this is bad
The meat looks very tender
As you can see,
the chopsticks go right in
Wow, looks so tender
Wow, it's good
It doesn't smell gamey at all, and it's so tender
Rice cake
(Slightly in danger)
It's still fine, I'm good at eating spicy stuff these days
(Bawling...) I'm already tearing up
- Excuse me, I would like one bowl of rice, please - Okay
(It's spicy but it's also very delicious) Oh, it's good, it's really good

I'll eat the braised beef ribs after eating this
(Scared) I'm still scared...
(Soft tofu stew)
Thank you, it's white!
(It's to calm your mouth, so it's clear soup!) It's spicy, so it comes out white
Thank you
This is...
Soft tofu egg...
Soft tofu and...
eggs inside
Mmm, it's so good!
Wow, it's so delicious
Producer, you usually eat the "normal" level, right?
(We came here thanks to the producer's recommendation!) I don't remember but I think so, it was very spicy
Then, if I...
(Snort) If I ... eat all this...

(Competitive machine that wants to win everything) it means I can eat spicy stuff better than you
O...Okay...
(The problematic spicier braised beef ribs...) Oh, this color looks too scary
(Even the employee can't eat the "spicy" level...) I can't eat it either...
- You never tried it? - Yeah
(How does it taste...?)
(Adds sedatives right away being surprised...) Oh, it's spicy but...
It's really spicy but...
It's not to the point it's inedible
I'll try one of the braised beef ribs
The seasoning seeps better into beef, right?
The beef is tender for sure
The meat is good too
It's so soft
I looked it up online
and most people said the pork ribs are more delicious

But
(Tzuyang's fave is the braised beef ribs!) I think I prefer the beef ribs more!
It's so tender
Awesome
(Savior arrives...) Oh my, wow, thank you
(A present from someone who knows the spice wimp well) I'm worried because you're not good at eating spicy stuff
Wow, awesome
(So grateful) Ma'am, thank you so much
(Please give lots of love to the Yeonsinnae branch) The Yeonsinnae branch owner
(Full recovery) I am fully back
Oh, the beef ribs are really good
(Ordered a little since it's spicy, but it's a shame...) I should've ordered 3 servings of it, what a bummer
Oh, the pork ribs are good too
It's soft
You're supposed to put a bit of bean sprouts in here,
so I will do just that

(Bean sprouts are a must for spicy food) Let's add it into the spicy one
The fun of eating ribs is to hold it in your hand
But the meat comes right off
This one's softer than the beef ribs
Dice it up finely
The soup is spicy
but I can't resist this
(Rice with the spicy soup...?)
(Is she really escaping the spice wimp title...?) I'm really good at eating spicy stuff these days!
(With full confidence, she dips the spoon into the soup)
(Tremble)
(Are you sure you're okay...?) My lips are trembling
Shouldn't you stop eating it now...?
No!
(Endure it) I'm still okay
Oh, instead of tears,

(Her eyes are in dire need of rest) I have a runny nose
(Bean sprouts that are perfect with spicy food)
For the beef ribs, they made it so that
it's already deboned
The meat is so soft!
This is the prime example of a basic
(Only the braised ribs) because there's no cheese, no noodles, no nothing
Normally, they would add cheese here
(The braised ribs are plenty without toppings) But it's enough without it
Wow, there's a fierce amount of chili peppers in here
Wow, I love the rice cakes
The rice cakes here are so good
It's made with rice too
But I recommend the "normal" level
(The "normal" level gives you a clear taste of the ribs) Even if you like spicy stuff, I think the normal one tastes better
The spiciness...

(About to pass out) is deathly...
(Come back, my eyes....)
(I might be quite strong...!) I think I'm doing better than expected!
Wow, there's a lot of meat too
Oh, it's a lot!
(Tremble)
I always say this
There's a spicy flavor that relives your stress
and a spicy flavor that gives you more stress
(Sniffle)
This one is one that relieves stress
- (Dear Tzuyang...) - Oh, it's no joke!
(The avid fan is thinking of Tzuyang's health) You're good at eating spicy stuff
It's fine
The potatoes cooked well
(Tzu-man appears) I should mash this with rice and eat it

(Life hack) A way to enjoy braised ribs
Cut it
(Life hack for braised ribs) 1. Cut up all the ribs, potatoes, and more
(2. Get a spoonful of soup)
(3. Mix it up deliciously)
(True to the name, a bite of the best braised ribs)
Wow, the rice is really good!
(Looks good, right?) Can you see the mashed potatoes?
Awesome, right?
It's insane, it's so good
(Ms. Tzu started begging for her life...) Oh...help
(She's saving the mashed potatoes instead of herself)
To here...
(Cut)
(Braised ribs life hack that I really want to recommend to you)
Wow, this is the good stuff

(Touched)
I heard there are a lot of regular customers here
If you haven't tried it like this, please try it
It's so good
(Her eyes have lost control all the way now...)
(Along with her mentality)
(Her eyes are back)
(Her mentality is back with her eyes) I think I'm better now
Eating mashed potatoes is the best
Should I eat the beef ribs with the bones?
Wow, the meat comes right off the bone
(Ribs come right off...) Wow... I'm telling you, it's so tender!
(Almost like bed covers) This one came right off too
I'm really, really good...
(Praising herself) at eating spicy stuff!
Is it not that spicy...?

(Producer verifies it) You seem to eat it well, so I'll try
It's spicy!!!!!
- (Of course) - What?
(Producer is sweating bullets LOLOL) You're sweating so much!
- You're not a spice wimp anymore - Wow, I'm not a spice wimp now
Braised beef rib with a bunch of spicy sauce
Even the meat with the spicy sauce
(Can't believe Tzuyang is not a spice wimp...) is edible now
(Everyone is flustered at the sudden escape of the spice wimp) I don't know why but I'm not a spice wimp now
Oh, can you see the stack of potatoes here?
(Collected the potatoes like a squirrel collecting nuts) I collected them like they were acorns
(Even the former spice wimp needs the water of life)
First off,
I thought this had a bone in it
(Only meat) But it doesn't
(Just meat itself) This is all just meat

Huh, I only have one left now?
It's the end?
(Gotta admit that she is no longer a spice wimp) I fished up a potato
(The store is crowded with customers) It's nearing dinnertime now, so a lot of customers are coming
I'll be a distraction, so I better eat quickly
The spiciness comes up all of a sudden?
(She reached her limit with one left over (Sorry)) This is the last one, eat it
(Done) The end
(This is appalling...)
I think I relieved my stress very well today
I had a great meal once again
